name: IndusInd Nexxt Credit Card

categoryRates.description: 0.7% cashback on all spends when cashback button is selected
5X Reward Points on all spends when rewards button is selected
Instant EMI conversion on purchases when EMI button is selected

additionalBenefits: World's first interactive credit card with physical buttons
Three modes selectable via card buttons: Cashback, Rewards, EMI
No joining or annual fee - lifetime free
Fuel surcharge waiver up to ₹200 per month
Instant EMI conversion without calling the bank
pros: Lifetime free card with zero joining and annual fee
Innovative interactive buttons for mode selection
Three distinct modes: cashback, rewards, and EMI
Good entry-level card for first-time users
cons: Cashback rate of 0.7% is below average
idealFor: First-time credit card users looking for a no-fee card
Tech enthusiasts interested in the interactive button feature
Users who frequently convert purchases to EMI

faqs.question: How do the interactive buttons on the Nexxt card work?
faqs.answer: The IndusInd Nexxt card has three physical buttons on the card face. Before making a purchase, you press the button for your desired mode: Cashback, Rewards, or EMI. The LED indicator confirms your selection. The card then processes the transaction in the selected mode.

faqs.question: Is the Nexxt card really lifetime free?
faqs.answer: Yes, the IndusInd Nexxt Credit Card has zero joining fee, zero annual fee, and zero renewal fee. It is a lifetime free card with no spending conditions required for fee waiver.

faqs.question: What is the cashback rate on the Nexxt card?
faqs.answer: In cashback mode, you earn 0.7% cashback on all eligible spends. While this is lower than some dedicated cashback cards, the benefit of this card lies in its flexibility across three modes.

faqs.question: Does the Nexxt card offer lounge access?
faqs.answer: No, the IndusInd Nexxt card does not offer any domestic or international lounge access. It is an entry-level card focused on the interactive button feature and basic rewards.
